ocr_findings.description: 業務要件 branch diagram (組織及び環境要件/システム要件/機能要件/非機能要件) replaced by image placeholder img-0.jpeg. Diagram structure lost but surrounding text explains it fully.

reviewer_notes: Page 221 covers システム要件定義, 機能要件 vs 非機能要件. Both tables (種類 and 具体例) captured correctly with full cell content. Branch diagram loss is cosmetic given surrounding explanatory text. No high or med severity issues.
